name: Efficiency-and-Flow signal degrades to empty rather than crashing when prompt-skill performance source is missing
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'dimensions: {efficiency_and_flow: {enabled: true}}\nshare: never\n' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric skill-perf --config space/config.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'skill_perf=no_data' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
